g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the IndusDiag data ingestion layer')
sendPrompt('How does the IndusDiag parser work?')
sendPrompt('What anomaly detection methods does IndusDiag use?')
g.text: Statistical thresholds · ML models · pattern flags

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the IndusDiag root cause reasoner work?')
g.text: Causal inference · fault tree analysis · LLM reasoning

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does IndusDiag generate maintenance recommendations?')
g.text: Prioritised actions · urgency score · work orders
